title: Visible security reminder in adversarial-project
goal: Add an explicit, reminder-only line at the end of the adversarial-project flow (closing status block in the prompt and/or the slash-command body) telling the human to run a separate security pass — it never auto-runs and never files security findings into mini.

steps.title: Add reminder to prompt closing block
steps.detail: In src/prompts/sessionContext.ts add one visible, reminder-only line to the adversarial-project closing status block (~L700-704): security is a separate pass — after this phase is done and committed, run 'mini security' in a separate terminal so it reviews the finished, committed range with clean context. Never auto-run, no security findings filed here.

steps.title: Align stale in-body security reference
steps.detail: In the same function update the 'Security is out of scope here' section so it points to the project's own 'mini security' (terminal, post-done) instead of the built-in /security-review.

steps.title: Add reminder to slash-command body
steps.detail: In src/install/commands.ts (adversarial-project body, ~L117-127) add a matching reminder that security runs separately via 'mini security' in another terminal after done.

steps.title: Update prompt tests
steps.detail: In src/prompts/sessionContext.test.ts update the L601-604 test and assert the post-done 'mini security' reminder appears in the closing status block.

steps.title: Add slash-command body test
steps.detail: In src/install/commands.test.ts assert the adversarial-project body mentions the separate 'mini security' pass.

steps.title: Verify build, typecheck and tests pass
steps.detail: npm run build, typecheck and the full test suite all green.

autoCommit.subject: Phase 178: Visible security reminder in adversarial-project
